headline: AI for Manufacturing: Predictive Maintenance, Quality Control, and Digital Twins
description: AI is the brain of modern manufacturing — predicting equipment failures before they happen, detecting microscopic product defects at production line speed, and simulating entire factory operations in real-time digital twins. Industry 4.0 plus AI ("Industry 5.0") reduces downtime by 30-45%, defect rates by 35%, and energy consumption by 25%.

citation.name: Enabling Intelligent Industrial Automation: A Comprehensive Review of Machine Learning Applications in Manufacturing
Generative and Predictive AI for Digital Twin Systems in Advanced Manufacturing
